_comment: Cheffy dialogue tree (STUB). Data, not code -- copy and options change here without touching components. See CHEFFY-SYSTEM.md > Dialogue system.
_start: Id of the node Cheffy opens on.
_node_shape: Each entry in 'nodes' is { text, expression?, input?, options:[{label, goto? , action?}] }. 'goto' moves to another node id; 'action' runs a handler. expression is one of: neutral|excited|thinking|sleepy. input:true shows a free-text field.
_actions: Valid option 'action' values the runtime must implement: generate-ics | trigger-permission | navigate-to-archive | export-checklist | close.

root.text: Hi, I'm Cheffy. Want a hand with this week?

options.label: Add cooking times to my calendar

calendar.text: I can add all of this week's times, or just one meal.

search.text: Type a week or a meal name and I'll jump there.
